3055480.name: 直播镜头
3055480.description:
Welcome to Live Lens

Experience the intensity of frontline combat like never before. Live Lens is a hyper-realistic bodycam-style shooter that plunges you into the heart of the action, capturing the raw, unfiltered essence of tactical warfare. Inspired by the latest in immersive simulation technology, Live Lens offers a gripping, authentic experience that will keep you on the edge of your seat. Live Lens unleashes the power that lies under Unreal Engine 5.

Hyper-Realistic Visuals:

Harnessing the advanced capabilities of Unreal Engine 5, Live Lens delivers stunningly detailed environments and lifelike character animations. Every bullet, every explosion, every motion is rendered with meticulous precision, making you feel like you're truly there.

Intense Tactical Gameplay:

Engage in strategic, adrenaline-pumping combat scenarios. Plan your moves carefully, use cover effectively, and outmaneuver your enemies. Every decision counts, and every moment could be your last.

Dynamic Environments:

Navigate through a variety of challenging terrains and weather conditions. From urban battlegrounds to dense forests, each environment offers unique challenges and requires different tactics.

Customization and Progression:

Personalize your gear and weapons to suit your playstyle. Earn rewards and unlock new equipment as you progress through the game, ensuring no two operatives are alike. (Progression system will come in the first update, to make sure the upgrades are as smooth as they need to be. Until then, the weapons are upgradeable with no limits.)

Immersive Bodycam Perspective:

Step into the boots of a frontline operative with a unique bodycam perspective. This innovative viewpoint enhances the sense of realism and urgency, providing a fresh, immersive take on the shooter genre.

Realistic Audio Design:

Experience the battlefield through unparalleled sound design. The crack of gunfire, the rumble of distant explosions, and the tense silence of a stealth approach – every sound adds to the immersion.

Multiplayer Mode:

Team up with friends or face off against rivals in intense multiplayer battles. Coordinate with your squad, execute precise strategies, and prove your dominance in various game modes.

Game Modes

Multiplayer:

Join forces with or battle against players worldwide. Engage in competitive matches, complete objectives, and rise through the ranks to become a legend.

Survival:

Face waves of zombies in this intense mode where your endurance and combat skills will be pushed to their limits. How long can you survive?
